result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 10:   JOIN last4q q ON ch.createddate >= q.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH last4q AS (
  SELECT '2022-04-10'::timestamp AS start_dt, '2023-04-10'::timestamp AS end_dt
), owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN last4q q ON ch.createddate >= q.start_dt AND ch.createddate < q.end_dt
  WHERE lower(trim(ch.field__c)) = 'owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    count(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(trim(x.owner_id), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c
    JOIN last4q q ON c.createddate >= q.start_dt AND c.createddate < q.end_dt
    WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND trim(c.ownerid) <> ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM owner_changes ch
    WHERE ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND trim(ch.oldvalue__c) <> ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM owner_changes ch
    WHERE ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND trim(ch.newvalue__c) <> ''
  ) x
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT
    ha.agent_id,
    COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agent_counts
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH last4q AS (
  SELECT '2022-04-10'::timestamp AS start_dt, '2023-04-10'::timestamp AS end_dt
), owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN last4q q ON ch.createddate >= q.start_dt AND ch.createddate < q.end_dt
  WHERE lower(trim(ch.field__c)) = 'owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    count(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(trim(x.owner_id), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c
    JOIN last4q q ON c.createddate >= q.start_dt AND c.createddate < q.end_dt
    WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND trim(c.ownerid) <> ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM owner_changes ch
    WHERE ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND trim(ch.oldvalue__c) <> ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM owner_changes ch
    WHERE ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND trim(ch.newvalue__c) <> ''
  ) x
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT
    ha.agent_id,
    COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agent_counts
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH last4q AS (
  SELECT '2022-04-10'::timestamp AS start_dt, '2023-04-10'::timestamp AS end_dt
), owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN last4q q ON ch.createddate >= q.start_dt AND ch.createddate < q.end_dt
  WHERE lower(trim(ch.field__c)) = 'owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    count(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(trim(x.owner_id), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c
    JOIN last4q q ON c.createddate >= q.start_dt AND c.createddate < q.end_dt
    WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND trim(c.ownerid) <> ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.oldvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM owner_changes ch
    WHERE ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND trim(ch.oldvalue__c) <> ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS owner_id
    FROM owner_changes ch
    WHERE ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND trim(ch.newvalue__c) <> ''
  ) x
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT
    ha.agent_id,
    COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count

SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM agent_counts
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

    JOIN last4q q ON c.createddate::timestamp >= q.start_dt AND c.createddate::timestamp < q.end_dt
    WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND trim(c.ownerid) <> ''

    UNION ALL

    SELECT ch.old_owner AS owner_id
